caption: The video depicts a panel discussion taking place in a modern, well-lit room. Three individuals are seated on white chairs behind small round tables, each equipped with microphones and water bottles. The central figure, a woman with blonde hair tied back, is actively speaking, gesturing with her hands as she addresses the audience or the other panelists. To her left, a man in a dark suit listens attentively, while another man in a patterned shirt sits to her right, also engaged in the conversation. Behind them, a large poster with text in Dutch and an image of hands clasped together adds context to the discussion, suggesting themes related to science, practice, and care. The audience, partially visible in the foreground, appears attentive, indicating a formal and professional setting for this event.
